Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The square double category of a 2-category

 In this file, we construct the square double category of a 2-category. Given a 2-category
 `C`, we define the following double category:
 - Objects: objects in `C`
 - Vertical morphisms: morphisms in `C`
 - Horizontal morphisms: morphisms in `C`
 - Squares with vertical sides `f : x₁ --> x₂` and `g : y₁ --> y₂` and horizontal sides
   `h : x₁ --> y₁` and `k : x₂ --> y₂` are 2-cells `h · g ==> f · k`

 One interesting aspect of this double category is its univalence. To guarantee that this
 double category is univalent, we need to assume that `C` is both univalent (which gives
 the univalence of the vertical category) and locally univalent (which gives the univalence
 of the horizontal category). This is because to guarantee that the horizontal category
 is univalent, identity of horizontal morphisms must correspond to invertible squares. This
 is not necessarily the case if `C` is only univalent as a category. If `C` is a category
 enriched in posets, then it satisfies this local univalence condition, and we thus obtain
 a univalent double category.

 Contents
 1. Horizontal operations
 2. The square double category of a 2-category
 3. The square pseudo double setcategory of a 2-setcategory

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TwoCategories.
Import TwoCategories.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.SquaresTwoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.StrictDoubleCatBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.PseudoDoubleSetCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.CompanionsAndConjoints.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section ArrowDoubleCategory.
  Context (C : two_cat).

  (** The following notation makes the goals more readable *)
  Local Notation "'idto2mor'" := (idto2mor _) (only printing).

  (** * 1. Horizontal operations *)
  
C: two_cat
hor_id_data (two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)

  
C: two_cat
hor_id_data (two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)

    
C: two_cat
∏ x : pr11 C, pr11 C ⟦ x, x ⟧
C: two_cat
∏ (x y : pr11 C) (f : pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
?Goal x · f ==> f · ?Goal y

    
C: two_cat
∏ x : pr11 C, pr11 C ⟦ x, x ⟧
 exact (λ x, identity x).
    
C: two_cat
∏ (x y : pr11 C) (f : pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
(λ x0 : pr11 C, identity x0) x · f ==>
f · (λ x0 : pr11 C, identity x0) y
 exact (λ x y f, two_cat_lunitor _ • two_cat_rinvunitor _).
  Defined.

  
C: two_cat
hor_id_laws
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: two_cat
hor_id_laws
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: two_cat
x: C
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (identity x) =
id_two_disp
  (double_id
     hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat x)
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat (f · g) =
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat f ;;2 
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat g

    
C: two_cat
x: C
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (identity x) =
id_two_disp
  (double_id
     hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat x)
 
C: two_cat
x: C
two_cat_lunitor (identity x)
• two_cat_rinvunitor (identity x) =
two_cat_runitor (identity x)
• two_cat_linvunitor (identity x)

      
C: two_cat
x: C
idto2mor • idto2mor = idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x: C
idto2mor = idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x: C
id_left (identity x) @ ! id_right (identity x) =
id_right (identity x) @ ! id_left (identity x)

      apply (homset_property C).
    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat (f · g) =
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat f ;;2 
double_id_mor
  hor_id_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat g
 
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
two_cat_lunitor (f · g) • two_cat_rinvunitor (f · g) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (identity x) f g
   • ((two_cat_lunitor f • two_cat_rinvunitor f) ▹ g))
  • two_cat_rassociator f (identity y) g)
 • (f ◃ (two_cat_lunitor g • two_cat_rinvunitor g)))
• two_cat_lassociator f g (identity z)

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((two_cat_lassociator (identity x) f g
   • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ g))
  • two_cat_rassociator f (identity y) g)
 • (f ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor)))
• two_cat_lassociator f g (identity z)

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ g)) • idto2mor)
 • (f ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ g)) • idto2mor)
 • ((f ◃ idto2mor) • (f ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor • ((idto2mor ▹ g) • (idto2mor ▹ g)))
  • idto2mor) • ((f ◃ idto2mor) • (f ◃ idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor • ((idto2mor ▹ g) • (idto2mor ▹ g)))
  • idto2mor) • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor = idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_left (f · g) @ ! id_right (f · g) =
(((assoc (identity x) f g @
   maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · g) (id_left f) @
   maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · g) (! id_right f)) @
  ! assoc f (identity y) g) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, f · q) (id_left g) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, f · q) (! id_right g)) @
assoc f g (identity z)

      apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

C: two_cat
∏ x y z : C,
two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
→ two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
  → two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x z
C: two_cat
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → ?Cm x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] ?Cm x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂

    
C: two_cat
∏ x y z : C,
two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
→ two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
  → two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x z
 exact (λ x y z f g, f · g).
    
C: two_cat
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → (λ (x y z : C)
     (f : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y)
     (g : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z),
     f · g) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] (λ (x y z : C)
            (f : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y)
            (g : two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z),
            f · g) x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂
 
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
h₁ · h₂ · v₃ ==> v₁ · (k₁ · k₂)

      exact (two_cat_rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ s₂)
             • two_cat_lassociator _ _ _
             • (s₁ ▹ _)
             • two_cat_rassociator _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
C: two_cat
hor_comp_laws
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: two_cat
hor_comp_laws
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp
     hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat h₁
     h₂)
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: C
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
l₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₃ y₃
l₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat s₁'
  s₂'

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp
     hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat h₁
     h₂)
 
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((two_cat_rassociator h₁ h₂ (identity z)
   • (h₁
      ◃ (two_cat_runitor h₂ • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
  • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (identity y) h₂)
 • ((two_cat_runitor h₁ • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ h₂))
• two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h₁ h₂ =
two_cat_runitor (h₁ · h₂)
• two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂)

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((two_cat_rassociator h₁ h₂ (identity z)
   • (h₁ ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor)))
  • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (identity y) h₂)
 • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ h₂))
• two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h₁ h₂ =
idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
 • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ h₂)) • idto2mor =
idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)))
  • idto2mor) • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ h₂))
• idto2mor = idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)))
  • idto2mor) • ((idto2mor ▹ h₂) • (idto2mor ▹ h₂)))
• idto2mor = idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((idto2mor • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • ((idto2mor ▹ h₂) • (idto2mor ▹ h₂))) • idto2mor =
idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((idto2mor • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
idto2mor • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idto2mor = idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: pr11 C
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((! assoc h₁ h₂ (identity z) @
   maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h₁ · q) (id_right h₂) @
   maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h₁ · q)
     (! id_left h₂)) @ assoc h₁ (identity y) h₂) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · h₂) (id_right h₁) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · h₂) (! id_left h₁)) @
! assoc (identity x) h₁ h₂ =
id_right (h₁ · h₂) @ ! id_left (h₁ · h₂)

      apply (homset_property C).
    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: C
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
l₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₃ y₃
l₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_data_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat s₁'
  s₂'
 
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((two_cat_rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
   • (h₁
      ◃ ((((two_cat_lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃' • (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
           • two_cat_rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
          • (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • two_cat_lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)))
  • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
 • (((((two_cat_lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂') • (v₁ ◃ s₁'))
     • two_cat_lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁) ▹ l₂))
• two_cat_rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
         • two_cat_lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃' • (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
         • two_cat_lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂) • (s₁' ▹ l₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)))
• two_cat_lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor
   • (h₁
      ◃ ((((idto2mor • (s₂ ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
          • (v₂ ◃ s₂')) • idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((idto2mor • (s₁ ▹ v₂')) • idto2mor)
      • (v₁ ◃ s₁')) • idto2mor) ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ s₂)) • idto2mor)
        • (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((((idto2mor • (k₁ ◃ s₂')) • idto2mor)
        • (s₁' ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor
   • (((((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
        • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)) • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
      • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((idto2mor • (s₁ ▹ v₂')) • idto2mor)
      • (v₁ ◃ s₁')) • idto2mor) ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ s₂)) • idto2mor)
        • (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
 • (((((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
      • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor)) • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor
   • (((((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
        • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)) • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
      • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((idto2mor ▹ l₂) • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (idto2mor ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (idto2mor ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ v₃') • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
        • (idto2mor ▹ v₃')) • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
      • (idto2mor ▹ v₃'))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
      • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor)) • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor
   • ((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))) • idto2mor)
       • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • (((((idto2mor ▹ l₂) • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (idto2mor ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (idto2mor ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ v₃') • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
        • (idto2mor ▹ v₃')) • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
      • (idto2mor ▹ v₃'))) • idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
     • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor
   • ((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))) • idto2mor)
       • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor)
     • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
(((idto2mor
   • ((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
       • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
     • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((((((((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
      • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • idto2mor) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor)
• idto2mor =
(((((((((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
         • idto2mor) • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
      • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
   • idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor)
• idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))) • idto2mor)
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
     • idto2mor) • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor)
  • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor) • idto2mor =
((((((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
        • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
     • idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
  • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
   • (idto2mor
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
   • (idto2mor
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))))) =
?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂

idto2mor
• ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
   • (idto2mor
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))))) =

• ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
   • (idto2mor

         • (idto2mor

C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • (idto2mor
            • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor))))))) =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂

• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • (idto2mor
            • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)) • idto2mor))))))) =
?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

• ((h₁ · v₂ ◃ s₂')

C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · v₂) k₂ v₃'
   • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • two_cat_rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ v₃')
 • (v₁ · k₁ ◃ s₂')) • idto2mor = ?t2

l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b = ?t2

          
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · v₂) k₂ v₃'
   • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • two_cat_rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ v₃')
 • (v₁ · k₁ ◃ s₂')) • idto2mor = ?b

s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · v₂) k₂ v₃'
  • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
 • two_cat_rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ v₃')
• (v₁ · k₁ ◃ s₂') = ?y'0

v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁

            apply lwhisker_comp_mor.
          
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · v₂) k₂ v₃'
   • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • two_cat_rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ v₃')
 • ((two_cat_rassociator v₁ k₁ (k₂ · v₃')
     • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
    • two_cat_lassociator v₁ k₁ (v₂' · l₂)))
• idto2mor = ?t2

          
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((idto2mor • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
 • ((idto2mor • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor))
• idto2mor = ?t2

          
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')) • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))) =
?t2

• (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')) • idto2mor)))) =

 • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor = ?y'

C: two_cat

v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧

s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((((((idto2mor • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
         • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
       • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor)) =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((((((idto2mor • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
         • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
       • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor))

• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • (idto2mor
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))))) =
?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((((((idto2mor • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor)
         • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))) • idto2mor)
       • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))) • idto2mor))

         • (idto2mor

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂

s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃') =
idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
idto2mor = idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: pr11 C
v₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': pr11 C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': pr11 C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: pr11 C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': pr11 C ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: pr11 C ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: pr11 C ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
assoc (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃' @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x₁, z₂ ⟧, q · v₃')
  (! assoc h₁ h₂ v₃) =
(! assoc h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃') @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y₁, z₃ ⟧, h₁ · q)
   (assoc h₂ v₃ v₃')) @ assoc h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'

      apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

 apply two_cat_linvunitor.

f: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y

  (two_cat_linvunitor f)
 abstract
        (split ; [ apply two_cat_lunitor_linvunitor | ] ;
         apply two_cat_linvunitor_lunitor).
  Defined.

C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ ((((two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁ · h₁)
           (identity y₁) v₂
         • (((two_cat_runitor (identity x₁ · h₁)
              • two_cat_lunitor h₁)
             • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
        • two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂)
       • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
      • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁ · h₁) v₂
     (identity y₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂
          • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
         • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂)
        • ((two_cat_lunitor v₁ • two_cat_rinvunitor v₁)
           ▹ h₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂)
      ▹ identity y₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (identity x₂ · h₂)
      (identity y₂))
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity x₂ · h₂)
        • two_cat_lunitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• two_cat_lassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁ · h₁)
         (identity y₁) v₂
       • (((two_cat_runitor (identity x₁ · h₁)
            • two_cat_lunitor h₁)
           • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
      • two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
    • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁ · h₁) v₂
     (identity y₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂
          • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
         • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂)
        • ((two_cat_lunitor v₁ • two_cat_rinvunitor v₁)
           ▹ h₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂)
      ▹ identity y₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (identity x₂ · h₂)
      (identity y₂))
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity x₂ · h₂)
        • two_cat_lunitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• two_cat_lassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (identity x₁ · h₁)
            • two_cat_lunitor h₁)
           • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor)
        • ((two_cat_lunitor v₁ • two_cat_rinvunitor v₁)
           ▹ h₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂))
  • idto2mor)
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity x₂ · h₂)
        • two_cat_lunitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (identity x₁ · h₁)
            • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor)
        • ((idto2mor • two_cat_rinvunitor v₁) ▹ h₂))
       • idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity x₂ · h₂) • idto2mor)
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂))
      • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor)
        • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ h₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (v₁ ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂))
      • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor)
        • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ h₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ v₂) • (idto2mor ▹ v₂))
          • (idto2mor ▹ v₂))) • idto2mor)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
         • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity y₂))
       • (((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)
          • ((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity y₂))) • idto2mor)
 • (((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(identity x₁ · h₁ ◃ idto2mor)
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h₂)))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
   • (((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
         • (((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)
            • (((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
                  • (idto2mor
                     • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                        • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                           • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                              • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h₂)))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
   • (((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
         • (((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)
            • (((idto2mor ▹ h₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂)
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) • idto2mor)))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂) • idto2mor))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
• idto2mor =
((idto2mor • idto2mor)
 • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor = ?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b =
(idto2mor • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor = ?b

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ) = ?y'

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
identity x₁ ◃ τ = ?t2

 • ((two_cat_lunitor (h₁ · v₂) • τ)
    • two_cat_linvunitor (v₁ · h₂))) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) ▹ identity y₂))

C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · identity y₁)
           (identity y₁) v₂
         • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · identity y₁)
              • two_cat_runitor h₁)
             • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
        • two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂)
       • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
      • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · identity y₁) v₂
     (identity y₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ (identity y₁) v₂
          • (h₁
             ◃ (two_cat_lunitor v₂
                • two_cat_rinvunitor v₂)))
         • two_cat_lassociator h₁ v₂ (identity y₂))
        • (τ ▹ identity y₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ h₂ (identity y₂))
      ▹ identity y₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (h₂ · identity y₂)
      (identity y₂))
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · identity y₂)
        • two_cat_runitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• two_cat_lassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · identity y₁)
         (identity y₁) v₂
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · identity y₁)
            • two_cat_runitor h₁)
           • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
      • two_cat_rassociator (identity x₁) h₁ v₂)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
    • two_cat_lassociator (identity x₁) v₁ h₂))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · identity y₁) v₂
     (identity y₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ (identity y₁) v₂
          • (h₁
             ◃ (two_cat_lunitor v₂
                • two_cat_rinvunitor v₂)))
         • two_cat_lassociator h₁ v₂ (identity y₂))
        • (τ ▹ identity y₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator v₁ h₂ (identity y₂))
      ▹ identity y₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator v₁ (h₂ · identity y₂)
      (identity y₂))
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · identity y₂)
        • two_cat_runitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• two_cat_lassociator v₁ (identity x₂) h₂

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · identity y₁)
            • two_cat_runitor h₁)
           • two_cat_linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (h₁
             ◃ (two_cat_lunitor v₂
                • two_cat_rinvunitor v₂))) • idto2mor)
        • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂))
  • idto2mor)
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · identity y₂)
        • two_cat_runitor h₂) • two_cat_linvunitor h₂)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · identity y₁)
            • two_cat_runitor h₁) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂))
      • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (h₁ ◃ (idto2mor • two_cat_rinvunitor v₂)))
         • idto2mor) • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · identity y₂)
        • two_cat_runitor h₂) • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂))
      • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor)))
         • idto2mor) • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (v₁ ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ v₂))
      • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)))
         • idto2mor) • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ v₂) • (idto2mor ▹ v₂))
          • (idto2mor ▹ v₂))) • idto2mor)
     • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
         • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂)
            • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂)))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity y₂))
       • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity y₂))) • idto2mor)
 • (((v₁ ◃ idto2mor) • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))
    • (v₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(h₁ · identity y₁ ◃ idto2mor)
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h₂)))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
   • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂)
      • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity y₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
            • (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
                  • (idto2mor
                     • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                        • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                           • ((v₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                              • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ v₂)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h₂)))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
            • (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • ((idto2mor ▹ identity y₂)
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ)
                  • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity x₁ ◃ τ) • idto2mor)))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂)
               • idto2mor)))))

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • (identity x₁ ◃ τ))
• idto2mor =
(((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
  • idto2mor) • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor = ?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ)) • idto2mor = ?b

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (identity x₁ ◃ τ) = ?y'

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
identity x₁ ◃ τ = ?t2

      apply id1_lwhisker.
    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor
 • ((two_cat_lunitor (h₁ · v₂) • τ)
    • two_cat_linvunitor (v₁ · h₂))) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • ((idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (idto2mor • (τ • (idto2mor • idto2mor))) =
idto2mor
• (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂) • idto2mor)

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)) =
idto2mor
• (((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂) • idto2mor)

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((idto2mor • idto2mor) • τ) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor = ?b
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂))
• idto2mor = ?b

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂) = ?y'

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(τ ▹ identity y₂) ▹ identity y₂ = ?t2

      apply rwhisker_id1.
    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor
 • ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · v₂ · identity y₂)
     • (τ ▹ identity y₂))
    • two_cat_rinvunitor (v₁ · h₂ · identity y₂)))
• idto2mor = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor
 • ((idto2mor • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor))
• idto2mor = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) • (idto2mor • idto2mor))) =
idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)

τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (idto2mor • ((τ ▹ identity y₂) • idto2mor)) =
idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂

v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((idto2mor • idto2mor) • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂

v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂

C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
?b = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • (τ ▹ identity y₂)) • idto2mor = ?b

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (τ ▹ identity y₂) = ?y'

      
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
τ ▹ identity y₂ = ?t2

      apply rwhisker_id1.
    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor
 • ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · v₂) • τ)
    • two_cat_rinvunitor (v₁ · h₂))) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • ((idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (idto2mor • (τ • (idto2mor • idto2mor))) =
idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
idto2mor • (idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)) =
idto2mor • (τ • idto2mor)

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
((idto2mor • idto2mor) • τ) • idto2mor =
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
(idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor = (idto2mor • τ) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
v₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
τ = τ

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y

is_inverse_in_precat (two_cat_lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)
  (two_cat_rassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)
 abstract
        (split ; [ apply two_cat_lassociator_rassociator | ] ;
         apply two_cat_rassociator_lassociator).
  Defined.

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
           (identity z₁) vz
         • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
              • two_cat_lassociator h₁ j₁ k₁)
             • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · j₁ · k₁)) ▹ vz))
        • two_cat_rassociator (identity w₁)
            (h₁ · j₁ · k₁) vz)
       • (identity w₁
          ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h₁ · j₁) k₁ vz
                • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
               • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · j₁) vy k₂)
              • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ j₁ vy
                     • (h₁ ◃ τ₂))
                    • two_cat_lassociator h₁ vx j₂)
                   • (τ₁ ▹ j₂))
                  • two_cat_rassociator vw h₂ j₂) ▹ k₂))
             • two_cat_rassociator vw (h₂ · j₂) k₂)))
      • two_cat_lassociator (identity w₁) vw
          (h₂ · j₂ · k₂)) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁)) vz
     (identity z₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ (j₁ · k₁) vz
          • (h₁
             ◃ ((((...) • two_cat_lassociator j₁ vy k₂)
                 • (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                • two_cat_rassociator vx j₂ k₂)))
         • two_cat_lassociator h₁ vx (j₂ · k₂))
        • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator vw h₂ (j₂ · k₂))
      ▹ identity z₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator vw (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂))
      (identity z₂))
 • (vw
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂))
        • two_cat_lassociator h₂ j₂ k₂)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h₂ · j₂ · k₂))))
• two_cat_lassociator vw (identity w₂) (h₂ · j₂ · k₂)

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
         (identity z₁) vz
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
            • two_cat_lassociator h₁ j₁ k₁)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · j₁ · k₁)) ▹ vz))
      • two_cat_rassociator (identity w₁)
          (h₁ · j₁ · k₁) vz)
     • (identity w₁
        ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h₁ · j₁) k₁ vz
              • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
             • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · j₁) vy k₂)
            • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ j₁ vy
                   • (h₁ ◃ τ₂))
                  • two_cat_lassociator h₁ vx j₂)
                 • (τ₁ ▹ j₂))
                • two_cat_rassociator vw h₂ j₂) ▹ k₂))
           • two_cat_rassociator vw (h₂ · j₂) k₂)))
    • two_cat_lassociator (identity w₁) vw
        (h₂ · j₂ · k₂))) • (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁)) vz
     (identity z₂)
   • (((((two_cat_rassociator h₁ (j₁ · k₁) vz
          • (h₁
             ◃ ((((...) • two_cat_lassociator j₁ vy k₂)
                 • (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                • two_cat_rassociator vx j₂ k₂)))
         • two_cat_lassociator h₁ vx (j₂ · k₂))
        • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
       • two_cat_rassociator vw h₂ (j₂ · k₂))
      ▹ identity z₂))
  • two_cat_rassociator vw (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂))
      (identity z₂))
 • (vw
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂))
        • two_cat_lassociator h₂ j₂ k₂)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h₂ · j₂ · k₂))))
• two_cat_lassociator vw (identity w₂) (h₂ · j₂ · k₂)

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
            • idto2mor)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · j₁ · k₁)) ▹ vz))
      • idto2mor)
     • (identity w₁
        ◃ ((((idto2mor • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)) • idto2mor)
            • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ τ₂)) • idto2mor)
                 • (τ₁ ▹ j₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ k₂))
           • idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (h₁
             ◃ ((((...) • idto2mor) • (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                • idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
        • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂))
  • idto2mor)
 • (vw
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h₂ · j₂ · k₂))))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (j₁ · k₁))
            • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ vz)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity w₁
        ◃ ((((idto2mor • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)) • idto2mor)
            • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ τ₂)) • idto2mor)
                 • (τ₁ ▹ j₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ k₂))
           • idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (h₁
             ◃ ((((...) • idto2mor) • (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                • idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
        • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂))
  • idto2mor)
 • (vw
    ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₂ · (j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor)
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ vz))
      • idto2mor)
     • (identity w₁
        ◃ ((((idto2mor • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)) • idto2mor)
            • (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ τ₂)) • idto2mor)
                 • (τ₁ ▹ j₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ k₂))
           • idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (h₁
             ◃ ((((...) • idto2mor) • (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                • idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
        • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂))
  • idto2mor)
 • (vw ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ vz))
      • idto2mor)
     • (((((identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor)
           • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
          • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))
         • (identity w₁
            ◃ (((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ τ₂)) • idto2mor)
                 • (τ₁ ▹ j₂)) • idto2mor) ▹ k₂)))
        • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (((((...) • (...)) • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor))
              • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • (h₁ ◃ idto2mor)))
         • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity z₂)) • idto2mor)
 • (((vw ◃ idto2mor) • (vw ◃ idto2mor))
    • (vw ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ vz) • (idto2mor ▹ vz))
          • (idto2mor ▹ vz))) • idto2mor)
     • (((((identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor)
           • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
          • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))
         • (identity w₁
            ◃ (((((idto2mor ▹ k₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂))
                 • (idto2mor ▹ k₂)) • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂) ▹ k₂))
               • (idto2mor ▹ k₂))))
        • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
         • ((((((...) ▹ identity z₂)
               • ((...) ▹ identity z₂))
              • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂))
             • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
            • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂)))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity z₂))
       • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z₂))) • idto2mor)
 • (((vw ◃ idto2mor) • (vw ◃ idto2mor))
    • (vw ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ vz) • (idto2mor ▹ vz))
          • (idto2mor ▹ vz))) • idto2mor)
     • (((((identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor)
           • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
          • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))
         • (((((identity w₁ ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k₂))
               • (identity w₁ ◃ ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂)))
              • (identity w₁ ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k₂)))
             • (identity w₁ ◃ ((τ₁ ▹ j₂) ▹ k₂)))
            • (identity w₁ ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k₂))))
        • (identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₂ · j₂ · k₂) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
         • ((((((...) ▹ identity z₂)
               • ((...) ▹ identity z₂))
              • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂))
             • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
            • ((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂)))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity z₂))
       • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z₂))) • idto2mor)
 • (((vw ◃ idto2mor) • (vw ◃ idto2mor))
    • (vw ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(h₁ · (j₁ · k₁) ◃ idto2mor)
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ vz)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ vz)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ vz)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                  • ((identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
                     • ((identity w₁ ◃ idto2mor)
                        • ((identity w₁
                            ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k₂))
                           • ((identity w₁
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ k₂))
                              • ((identity w₁ ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
   • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂)
      • (((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂)
         • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂)
            • (((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂)
               • (((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z₂)
                  • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
                     • (((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂)
                        • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
                           • (idto2mor
                              • ((vw ◃ idto2mor)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ vz)

         • ((idto2mor ▹ vz)
            • (idto2mor

• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
      • (((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)

                        • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z₂)
                           • (idto2mor
                              • (idto2mor
                                 • (idto2mor • (...)))))))))))))

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((((((((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
          • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
       • idto2mor) • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
     • idto2mor) • idto2mor)

  • idto2mor) • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂))
• idto2mor

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((idto2mor • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
     • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
   • (identity w₁ ◃ ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor)

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂)) • idto2mor

τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂

((((((idto2mor • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))

k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idto2mor
• ((identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • ((identity w₁ ◃ ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂))
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) • idto2mor)))))))) =
?b

     • (identity w₁ ◃ ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor)

• idto2mor = ?y'

τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((idto2mor • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
• ((h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂) = ?y'0

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂

vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(h₁ ◃ τ₂) ▹ k₂ = ?t2

        apply lwhisker_rwhisker_mor.

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(((((idto2mor • (identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
    • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((two_cat_rassociator h₁ (j₁ · vy) k₂
     • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)))
    • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (vx · j₂) k₂)) • idto2mor =

    • idto2mor) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor))
• idto2mor = ?y'

      
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idto2mor
• ((identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))
                  • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))) = 
?y'

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

identity w₁ ◃ (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃) = ?t2

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(idto2mor
 • ((two_cat_lunitor (h₁ · j₁ · (k₁ · vz))
     • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃))
    • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · j₁ · (vy · k₂))))
• idto2mor = ?y'

• idto2mor = ?y'

h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(idto2mor • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)) • idto2mor = ?y'

τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(idto2mor • (h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃)) • idto2mor = ?b

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
