h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
h₁ · j₁ ◃ τ₃ = ?t2

        apply lwhisker_comp_mor.
      
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(idto2mor
 • ((two_cat_rassociator h₁ j₁ (k₁ · vz)
     • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)))
    • two_cat_lassociator h₁ j₁ (vy · k₂))) • idto2mor =
?y'

vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(idto2mor • ((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃))) • idto2mor))
• idto2mor = ?y'

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃))) • idto2mor)
   • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
• idto2mor =
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂)) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂)) • idto2mor =
(((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃))) • idto2mor)
   • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
• idto2mor

vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂

τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂)) • idto2mor = ?b

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

   • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
• idto2mor

j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
    • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
  • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
• ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂) = ?y'

        
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂) ▹ identity z₂ = ?t2

        apply rwhisker_id1.
      
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · vx · (j₂ · k₂))
     • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
    • two_cat_rinvunitor (vw · h₂ · (j₂ · k₂))))
• idto2mor = ?b

w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C

h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂

j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂

vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
((((((idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂))
     • idto2mor) • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂))
   • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
 • ((idto2mor • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)) • idto2mor))
• idto2mor = ?b

      
C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂)
   • (idto2mor
      • (((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) ▹ identity z₂)
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • ((τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂)
                     • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))))))) =
?b

j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁

vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idto2mor
• (((h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃)) ▹ identity z₂)
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor • ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂)) • idto2mor)))) =

C: two_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₁ x₁
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w₂ x₂
j₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₁ y₁
j₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x₂ y₂
k₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₁ z₁
k₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y₂ z₂
vw: C ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃))) • idto2mor)
   • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
• idto2mor =
(((((idto2mor • (h₁ ◃ (j₁ ◃ τ₃))) • idto2mor)
   • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ k₂))) • idto2mor) • (τ₁ ▹ j₂ · k₂))
• idto2mor

    refine (arr_idto2mor_eq3 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _) ; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  double_cat_lunitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

C: two_cat
triangle_law
  double_cat_lunitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  double_cat_runitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
double_associator
  double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  h
  (double_id hor_id_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat y)
  k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
          hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
          (double_runitor
             double_cat_runitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
             h) (id_two_disp k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor
       hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor
          double_cat_lunitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
          k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((two_cat_lassociator (h · (identity y · k))
     (identity z) (identity z)
   • (((two_cat_runitor (h · (identity y · k))
        • two_cat_lassociator h (identity y) k)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h · identity y · k))
      ▹ identity z))
  • two_cat_rassociator (identity x)
      (h · identity y · k) (identity z))
 • (identity x
    ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h · identity y) k
            (identity z)
          • (h · identity y
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor k
                • two_cat_linvunitor k)))
         • two_cat_lassociator (h · identity y)
             (identity y) k)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h · identity y)
             • two_cat_runitor h)
            • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k))
       • two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h k)))
• two_cat_lassociator (identity x) (identity x)
    (h · k) =
trb₂ ((((two_cat_rassociator h (identity y · k)
           (identity z)
         • (h
            ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity y · k)
                • two_cat_lunitor k)
               • two_cat_linvunitor k)))
        • two_cat_lassociator h (identity y) k)
       • ((two_cat_runitor h • two_cat_linvunitor h)
          ▹ k)) • two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((two_cat_lassociator (h · (identity y · k))
     (identity z) (identity z)
   • (((two_cat_runitor (h · (identity y · k))
        • two_cat_lassociator h (identity y) k)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h · identity y · k))
      ▹ identity z))
  • two_cat_rassociator (identity x)
      (h · identity y · k) (identity z))
 • (identity x
    ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h · identity y) k
            (identity z)
          • (h · identity y
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor k
                • two_cat_linvunitor k)))
         • two_cat_lassociator (h · identity y)
             (identity y) k)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h · identity y)
             • two_cat_runitor h)
            • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k))
       • two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h k)))
• two_cat_lassociator (identity x) (identity x)
    (h · k) =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((two_cat_rassociator h (identity y · k)
         (identity z)
       • (h
          ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity y · k)
              • two_cat_lunitor k)
             • two_cat_linvunitor k)))
      • two_cat_lassociator h (identity y) k)
     • ((two_cat_runitor h • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k))
    • two_cat_rassociator (identity x) h k))
• (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((two_cat_runitor (h · (identity y · k))
        • idto2mor)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h · identity y · k))
      ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (identity x
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h · identity y
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor k
                • two_cat_linvunitor k))) • idto2mor)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h · identity y)
             • two_cat_runitor h)
            • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k)) • idto2mor)))
• idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (h
          ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (identity y · k)
              • two_cat_lunitor k)
             • two_cat_linvunitor k))) • idto2mor)
     • ((two_cat_runitor h • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k))
    • idto2mor)) • (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((idto2mor • idto2mor)
       • two_cat_linvunitor (h · identity y · k))
      ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (identity x
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h · identity y
             ◃ (idto2mor • two_cat_linvunitor k)))
         • idto2mor)
        • (((idto2mor • idto2mor)
            • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k)) • idto2mor)))
• idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (h
          ◃ ((idto2mor • two_cat_lunitor k)
             • two_cat_linvunitor k))) • idto2mor)
     • ((idto2mor • two_cat_linvunitor h) ▹ k))

C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ identity z))
  • idto2mor)
 • (identity x
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h · identity y ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor)))
         • idto2mor)
        • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ k))
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (h ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
      • idto2mor) • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ k))
    • idto2mor)) • (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ identity z))
  • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity x ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))
     • (identity x
        ◃ (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ k)))
    • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((h ◃ idto2mor) • (h ◃ idto2mor))
          • (h ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
     • ((idto2mor • idto2mor) ▹ k)) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
       • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity x ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))
     • (identity x
        ◃ (((idto2mor ▹ k) • (idto2mor ▹ k))
           • (idto2mor ▹ k))))
    • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((h ◃ idto2mor) • (h ◃ idto2mor))
          • (h ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
     • ((idto2mor ▹ k) • (idto2mor ▹ k))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(((idto2mor
   • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
       • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity x ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity x ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))
     • (((identity x ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))
         • (identity x ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k)))
        • (identity x ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))))
    • (identity x ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor =
((h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((h ◃ idto2mor) • (h ◃ idto2mor))
          • (h ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
     • ((idto2mor ▹ k) • (idto2mor ▹ k))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h · k)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • (idto2mor
            • ((identity x ◃ idto2mor)
               • ((identity x
                   ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))
                  • ((identity x
                      ◃ (h · identity y ◃ idto2mor))
                     • ((identity x ◃ idto2mor)
                        • ((identity x
                            ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))
                           • ((identity x
                               ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))
                              • ((identity x ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • idto2mor)))))))))))) =
(h · (identity y · k) ◃ idto2mor)
• (idto2mor
   • ((h ◃ idto2mor)
      • ((h ◃ idto2mor)
         • ((h ◃ idto2mor)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((idto2mor ▹ k)
                  • ((idto2mor ▹ k)
                     • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h · k)))))))))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • ((identity x
                            ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))
                           • ((identity x
                               ◃ (idto2mor ▹ k))
                              • ((identity x ◃ (...))
                                 • (idto2mor
                                    • idto2mor)))))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • ((idto2mor ▹ k)
                  • ((idto2mor ▹ k)
                     • (idto2mor • (idto2mor ▹ h · k)))))))))

                                  ◃ idto2mor)
                                 • (idto2mor
                                    • idto2mor)))))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor

            • (idto2mor

                  • (idto2mor • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))

                              • (idto2mor

C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
h: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
k: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
assoc (h · (identity y · k)) (identity z) (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (id_right (h · (identity y · k))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (assoc h (identity y) k) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (! id_left (h · identity y · k)) @
! assoc (identity x) (h · identity y · k) (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (! assoc (h · identity y) k (identity z)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h · identity y · q)
     (id_right k)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h · identity y · q)
     (! id_left k)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (assoc (h · identity y) (identity y) k) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · k)
     (id_right (h · identity y))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · k) (id_right h)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · k) (! id_left h)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, identity x · q)
  (! assoc (identity x) h k) @
assoc (identity x) (identity x) (h · k) =
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ z, z ⟧, h · (identity y · k) · q)
  (id_left (identity z)) @
! assoc h (identity y · k) (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h · q)
  (id_right (identity y · k)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h · q) (id_left k) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h · q) (! id_left k) @
assoc h (identity y) k @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · k) (id_right h) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, q · k) (! id_left h) @
! assoc (identity x) h k @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, q · (h · k))
  (! id_left (identity x))

    apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

  
C: two_cat
pentagon_law
  double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: two_cat
pentagon_law
  double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
trb₂ (double_associator
        double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
        h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp
           hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat h₃
           h₄) ;;2 double_associator
                     double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                     (double_hor_comp
                        hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                        h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄) =
double_hor_comp_mor
  hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
  (id_two_disp h₁)
  (double_associator
     double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
     h₂ h₃ h₄) ;;2 double_associator
                     double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                     h₁
                     (double_hor_comp
                        hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                        h₂ h₃) h₄ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                        hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                                        (double_associator
                                           double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
                                           h₁ h₂ h₃)
                                        (id_two_disp
                                           h₄)

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
trb₂ ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
           (identity z) (identity z)
         • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
              • two_cat_lassociator h₁ h₂ (h₃ · h₄))
             • two_cat_linvunitor
                 (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))) ▹ identity z))
        • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
            (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) (identity z))
       • (identity v
          ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))
              • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ h₄)
             • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄))))
      • two_cat_lassociator (identity v) (identity v)
          (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
     (identity z · identity z) (identity z)
   • (((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
            (identity z) (identity z)
          • (((((...) • two_cat_lassociator h₁ ... ...)
               • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • two_cat_rassociator (identity v) h₁
                  (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) ▹ identity z))
         • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
             (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) (identity z))
        • (identity v
           ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
               • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) h₄)
              • two_cat_linvunitor
                  (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄))))
       • two_cat_lassociator (identity v) (identity v)
           (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄)) ▹ identity z))
  • two_cat_rassociator (identity v · identity v)
      (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄) (identity z))
 • (identity v · identity v
    ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)) h₄
            (identity z)
          • (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor h₄
                • two_cat_linvunitor h₄)))
         • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃))
             (identity y) h₄)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃))
             • two_cat_lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)
            • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)) ▹ h₄))
       • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
           (h₁ · h₂ · h₃) h₄)))
• two_cat_lassociator (identity v · identity v)
    (identity v) (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
         (identity z) (identity z)
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
            • two_cat_lassociator h₁ h₂ (h₃ · h₄))
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
          ▹ identity z))
      • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
          (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) (identity z))
     • (identity v
        ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))
            • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · h₂) h₃ h₄)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄))))
    • two_cat_lassociator (identity v) (identity v)
        (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
     (identity z · identity z) (identity z)
   • (((((two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
            (identity z) (identity z)
          • (((((...) • two_cat_lassociator h₁ ... ...)
               • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • two_cat_rassociator (identity v) h₁
                  (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) ▹ identity z))
         • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
             (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) (identity z))
        • (identity v
           ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
               • two_cat_lassociator h₁ (h₂ · h₃) h₄)
              • two_cat_linvunitor
                  (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄))))
       • two_cat_lassociator (identity v) (identity v)
           (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄)) ▹ identity z))
  • two_cat_rassociator (identity v · identity v)
      (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄) (identity z))
 • (identity v · identity v
    ◃ ((((two_cat_rassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)) h₄
            (identity z)
          • (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor h₄
                • two_cat_linvunitor h₄)))
         • two_cat_lassociator (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃))
             (identity y) h₄)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃))
             • two_cat_lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃)
            • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)) ▹ h₄))
       • two_cat_rassociator (identity v)
           (h₁ · h₂ · h₃) h₄)))
• two_cat_lassociator (identity v · identity v)
    (identity v) (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
            • idto2mor)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
          ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity v
        ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))
            • idto2mor)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄))))
    • idto2mor)) • (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (((((...) • idto2mor) • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • idto2mor) ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
        • (identity v
           ◃ ((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
               • idto2mor)
              • two_cat_linvunitor
                  (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄)))) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (identity v · identity v
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)
             ◃ (two_cat_runitor h₄
                • two_cat_linvunitor h₄))) • idto2mor)
        • (((two_cat_runitor (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃))
             • idto2mor)
            • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)) ▹ h₄))
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
          ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity v
        ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor)
           • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄))))
    • idto2mor)) • (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (((((...) • idto2mor) • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • idto2mor) ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
        • (identity v
           ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor)
              • two_cat_linvunitor
                  (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄)))) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (identity v · identity v
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)
             ◃ (idto2mor • two_cat_linvunitor h₄)))
         • idto2mor)
        • (((idto2mor • idto2mor)
            • two_cat_linvunitor (h₁ · h₂ · h₃)) ▹ h₄))
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
          ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
     • (identity v
        ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
    • idto2mor)) • (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (((((...) • idto2mor) • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • idto2mor) ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
        • (identity v
           ◃ ((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)))
       • idto2mor) ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (identity v · identity v
    ◃ ((((idto2mor
          • (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ (idto2mor • idto2mor)))
         • idto2mor)
        • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ h₄))
       • idto2mor))) • idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
          ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
     • (((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
         • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))
        • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor
          • (((((...) • idto2mor) • ((...) ▹ ... · h₄))
              • idto2mor) ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
        • (((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
            • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))
           • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor)
      ▹ identity z)) • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity v · identity v
           ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity v · identity v
             ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor))
     • (identity v · identity v
        ◃ (((idto2mor • idto2mor) • idto2mor) ▹ h₄)))
    • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
           • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
          • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
     • (((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
         • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))
        • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • ((((((...) ▹ identity z) • ((...) • (...)))
              • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z))
             • ((((...) ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                • (((...) ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)))
            • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
       • ((((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)
           • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z))
          • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity v · identity v
           ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity v · identity v
             ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor))
     • (identity v · identity v
        ◃ (((idto2mor ▹ h₄) • (idto2mor ▹ h₄))
           • (idto2mor ▹ h₄))))
    • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
((h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
           • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
          • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
     • (((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
         • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))
        • (identity v ◃ idto2mor))) • idto2mor))
• (idto2mor ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) =
(((idto2mor
   • (((((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • ((((((...) ▹ identity z) • ((...) • (...)))
              • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z))
             • ((((...) ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                • (((...) ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)))
            • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)))
        • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))
       • ((((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)
           • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z))
          • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)))
      • (idto2mor ▹ identity z))) • idto2mor)
 • (((((identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)
       • ((identity v · identity v
           ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))
          • (identity v · identity v
             ◃ (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) ◃ idto2mor))))
      • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor))
     • (((identity v · identity v ◃ (idto2mor ▹ h₄))
         • (identity v · identity v ◃ (idto2mor ▹ h₄)))
        • (identity v · identity v ◃ (idto2mor ▹ h₄))))
    • (identity v · identity v ◃ idto2mor)))
• idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
(h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) ◃ idto2mor)
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
            • (idto2mor
               • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
                  • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
                     • ((identity v ◃ idto2mor)
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor
                              ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)))))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
   • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
      • ((((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
         • ((((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)
             ▹ identity z)
            • ((((h₁ ◃ idto2mor) ▹ identity z)
                ▹ identity z)
               • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                   ▹ identity z)
                  • ((((idto2mor ▹ h₂ · h₃ · h₄)
                       ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                     • ((((idto2mor ▹ h₂ · h₃ · h₄)
                          ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                        • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                            ▹ identity z)
                           • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                              • (((...) ▹ identity z)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
      • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
         • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor
                              ▹ h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)))))))))) =
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
   • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
      • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
         • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
            • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
               • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                   ▹ identity z)
                  • ((((idto2mor ▹ h₂ · h₃ · h₄)
                       ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                     • ((((idto2mor ▹ h₂ · h₃ · h₄)
                          ▹ identity z) ▹ identity z)
                        • (((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                            ▹ identity z)
                           • ((idto2mor ▹ identity z)
                              • ((idto2mor
                                  ▹ identity z)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor
                              • (idto2mor
                                 • (idto2mor • (...)))))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor • idto2mor))))))))) =
idto2mor
• (idto2mor
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • (idto2mor
               • (idto2mor
                  • (idto2mor
                     • (idto2mor
                        • (idto2mor
                           • (idto2mor
                              • (idto2mor
                                 • (idto2mor • (...)))))))))))))

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
idto2mor = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
v, w, x, y, z: C
h₁: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C v w
h₂: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C w x
h₃: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C x y
h₄: two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C y z
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ z, z ⟧, h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) · q)
  (id_right (identity z · identity z)) @
assoc (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))) (identity z)
  (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (id_right (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (assoc h₁ h₂ (h₃ · h₄)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (! id_left (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))) @
! assoc (identity v) (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))
    (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
  (id_right (h₁ · h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
  (assoc (h₁ · h₂) h₃ h₄) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
  (! id_left (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄)) @
assoc (identity v) (identity v) (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, v ⟧, q · (h₁ · h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
  (! id_right (identity v · identity v)) =
assoc (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)))
  (identity z · identity z) (identity z) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (assoc (h₁ · (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))) (identity z)
     (identity z)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (! assoc h₁ (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄)) (identity z))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, h₁ · q)
        (id_right (h₂ · (h₃ · h₄))))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, h₁ · q)
        (assoc h₂ h₃ h₄))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, h₁ · q)
        (! id_left (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (assoc h₁ (identity w) (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ q : C ⟦ v, w ⟧, q · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
        (id_right h₁))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (maponpaths
        (λ q : C ⟦ v, w ⟧, q · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
        (! id_left h₁))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
     (! assoc (identity v) h₁ (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (! assoc (identity v) (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄))
       (identity z)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
     (id_right (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃ · h₄)))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
     (assoc h₁ (h₂ · h₃) h₄)) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · q)
     (! id_left (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄))) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, q · identity z)
  (assoc (identity v) (identity v)
     (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄)) @
! assoc (identity v · identity v)
    (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃) · h₄) (identity z) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · identity v · q)
  (! assoc (h₁ · (h₂ · h₃)) h₄ (identity z)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · identity v · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h₁ · (...) · q)
     (id_right h₄)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · identity v · q)
  (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, z ⟧, h₁ · ... · q)
     (! id_left h₄)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, identity v · identity v · q)
  (assoc (h₁ · (...)) (identity y) h₄) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ v, z ⟧, ... · ... · q)
  (maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (id_right ...)) @
maponpaths (λ q : ..., ... · q)
  (maponpaths (...) (...)) @
maponpaths (λ ..., ...) (maponpaths ... ...) @
maponpaths (...) (! ...) @ assoc (...) (...) (...)

    apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.
End ArrowDoubleCategory.

(** * 2. The square double category of a 2-category *)

C: two_cat
double_cat


C: two_cat
double_cat

  
C: two_cat
category
C: two_cat
twosided_disp_cat ?C ?C
C: two_cat
hor_id ?D
C: two_cat
hor_comp ?D
C: two_cat
double_cat_lunitor ?I ?Cm
C: two_cat
double_cat_runitor ?I ?Cm
C: two_cat
double_cat_associator ?Cm
C: two_cat
triangle_law ?l ?r ?a
C: two_cat
pentagon_law ?a

  
C: two_cat
category
 exact C.
  
C: two_cat
twosided_disp_cat C C
 exact (two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
hor_id (two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
 exact (hor_id_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
hor_comp (two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
 exact (hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
double_cat_lunitor
  (hor_id_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
  (hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
 exact (double_cat_lunitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
double_cat_runitor
  (hor_id_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
  (hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
 exact (double_cat_runitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
double_cat_associator
  (hor_comp_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C)
 exact (double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
triangle_law
  (double_cat_lunitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
     C)
  (double_cat_runitor_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
     C)
  (double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
     C)
 exact (triangle_law_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
  
C: two_cat
pentagon_law
  (double_cat_associator_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat
     C)
 exact (pentagon_law_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat C).
Defined.


C: two_cat
all_companions_double_cat
  (two_cat_square_double_cat C)


C: two_cat
all_companions_double_cat
  (two_cat_square_double_cat C)

  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
∑ h : hor_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C) x y,
double_cat_are_companions h f

  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
double_cat_are_companions f f

  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
square f (identity_v y) f (identity_h y)
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
square (identity_v x) f (identity_h x) f
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
transportf_square
  (id_v_right
     (ver_comp_double_cat (identity_v x)
        (identity_v x)) @ id_v_right (identity_v x))
  (id_v_right
     (ver_comp_double_cat (identity_v y)
        (identity_v y)) @ id_v_right (identity_v y))
  (comp_v_square
     (comp_v_square (linvunitor_h f)
        (comp_h_square ?ψ ?φ)) (runitor_h f)) =
id_v_square f
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
transportf_square (id_left f) (id_right f)
  (comp_v_square ?ψ ?φ) = id_h_square f

  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
square f (identity_v y) f (identity_h y)
 apply id2.
  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
square (identity_v x) f (identity_h x) f
 apply id2.
  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
transportf_square
  (id_v_right
     (ver_comp_double_cat (identity_v x)
        (identity_v x)) @ id_v_right (identity_v x))
  (id_v_right
     (ver_comp_double_cat (identity_v y)
        (identity_v y)) @ id_v_right (identity_v y))
  (comp_v_square
     (comp_v_square (linvunitor_h f)
        (comp_h_square (id2 (identity_v x · f))
           (id2 (f · identity_h y)))) (runitor_h f)) =
id_v_square f
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
       rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
       rewrite !id2_right ;
       rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
       rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
       refine (transportf_disp_mor2_two_cat_arrow _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
       unfold two_cat_lassociator, two_cat_rassociator ;
       unfold two_cat_runitor, two_cat_rinvunitor ;
       unfold two_cat_lunitor, two_cat_linvunitor ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_lwhisker ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_rwhisker ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply (homset_property C)).
  
C: two_cat
x, y: two_cat_square_double_cat C
f: ver_mor_double_cat x y
transportf_square (id_left f) (id_right f)
  (comp_v_square (id2 (identity_v x · f))
     (id2 (f · identity_h y))) = id_h_square f
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
       rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
       rewrite !id2_right ;
       refine (transportf_disp_mor2_two_cat_arrow _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
       unfold two_cat_lassociator, two_cat_rassociator ;
       unfold two_cat_runitor, two_cat_rinvunitor ;
       unfold two_cat_lunitor, two_cat_linvunitor ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_lwhisker ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_rwhisker ;
       rewrite !idto2mor_comp ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply (homset_property C)).
Defined.


C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
univalent_double_cat


C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
univalent_double_cat

  
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
double_cat
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent_double_cat ?C

  
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
double_cat
 exact (two_cat_square_double_cat C).
  
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent_double_cat (two_cat_square_double_cat C)
 
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent (two_cat_square_double_cat C)
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C))

    
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent (two_cat_square_double_cat C)
 apply C.
    
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C))
 
C: univalent_two_cat
H: locally_univalent_two_cat C
locally_univalent_two_cat C

      exact H.
Defined.

(** * 3. The square pseudo double setcategory of a 2-setcategory *)

C: two_setcat
pseudo_double_setcat


C: two_setcat
pseudo_double_setcat

  
C: two_setcat
double_cat
C: two_setcat
is_setcategory ?C
C: two_setcat
is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (hor_mor ?C)

  
C: two_setcat
double_cat
 exact (two_cat_square_double_cat C).
  
C: two_setcat
is_setcategory (two_cat_square_double_cat C)
 use is_setcategory_two_setcat.
  
C: two_setcat
is_strict_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C))
 use is_strict_two_cat_arrow_twosided_disp_cat.
Defined.
